source_pr.title: *: Set custom verbose flag to true
source_pr.body:
It will print every test name and the test takes time, it can help us locate problem.
e.g.
PASS: ddl_db_test.go:655: testDBSuite.TestUpdateMultipleTable	6.055s

Pass `make dev` and `make race`

fix_pattern: *: Set custom verbose flag to true

evidence: files: .gitignore, ast/flag_test.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, distsql/distsql_test.go, distsql/xeval/eval_test.go, domain/domain_test.go, evaluator/evaluator_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, infoschema/infoschema_test.go, inspectkv/inspectkv_test.go, kv/mem_buffer_test.go, meta/autoid/autoid_test.go, meta/meta_test.go, model/model_test.go, mysql/time_test.go, parser/parser_test.go, perfschema/perfschema_test.go, plan/plan_test.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go, server/server_test.go, sessionctx/binloginfo/binloginfo_test.go, sessionctx/db/db_test.go, sessionctx/domainctx_test.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar_test.go, store/localstore/boltdb/boltdb_test.go, store/localstore/goleveldb/goleveldb_test.go, store/localstore/xapi_test.go, store/store_test.go, store/tikv/client_test.go, structure/structure_test.go, table/column_test.go, table/tables/tables_test.go, terror/terror_test.go, tidb_test.go, util/charset/charset_test.go, util/codec/codec_test.go, util/distinct/distinct_test.go, util/format/format_test.go, util/mock/mock_test.go, util/prefix_helper_test.go, util/printer/printer_test.go, util/stringutil/string_util_test.go, util/testutil/testutil_test.go
